escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war on day 51 with Strait of Hormuz closures, US naval blockade, French UNIFIL peacekeeper killed, and ceasefire deadlines approaching.

ticker_items: Iran keeps Strait of Hormuz closed as US-Iran ceasefire talks stall
French UNIFIL peacekeeper killed by Hezbollah fire in Lebanon
US blockade halts 90% of Iran's sea trade according to CENTCOM
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drone barrage on Ukraine
India-Russia pact allows 3,000 troops stationed in each territory

eastern_europe.description: Gunman opened fire in supermarket killing six people and taking hostages before being confronted by Ukrainian forces
Russian strikes killed at least two people in Ukraine while Ukraine struck a Russian drone factory.

middle_east.description: Israeli strikes on ambulances killed four paramedics and wounded six others
French UNIFIL peacekeeper killed and three wounded by small-arms fire during ordnance clearing.

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 Iranian, 26 Israeli, 13 US soldiers, 28 Gulf states

russia.text: Russia has shown restraint as Kiev and its Western backers crossed red lines, but its patience is not limitless
russia.speaker: Sergey Lavrov
russia.title: Foreign Minister

ukraine.text: Every dollar paid for Russian oil is money for the war
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: War could resume at any moment
middle_east.speaker: Iranian negotiator
middle_east.title: Unnamed negotiator

middle_east.text: Iran does not seek to expand war as the continuation of conflicts will not be beneficial to any country
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: Iranian President

observers.description: Pakistan ready for multi-day US-Iran talks but Iranian officials have yet to commit to second round of negotiations. Pakistani mediation efforts continue as ceasefire deadline approaches Wednesday.

China denies reports that Iran used Chinese-built spy satellites to target US military bases during Operation Epic Fury. Chinese Foreign Ministry rejected allegations of satellite intelligence sharing with Iran.

North Korea launched multiple ballistic missiles into eastern waters, continuing recent flurry of launches. IAEA chief warns of rapid increase in operations at North Korea's Yongbyon reactor boosting nuclear arms manufacturing capability.

India signed reciprocal logistics agreement with Russia allowing up to 3,000 troops, naval ships, and aircraft to be stationed in each other's territories. The pact became effective January 12, 2025 and aims to bolster long-term military cooperation.

financial.notes: Energy markets facing crisis as Strait of Hormuz remains closed with US naval blockade halting 90% of Iran's sea trade.

update_log.text: Iran keeps Strait of Hormuz closed as negotiations with US remain 'far off'
French UNIFIL peacekeeper killed by Hezbollah small-arms fire in southern Lebanon
Russian strikes kill at least 2 in Ukraine as spring offensive continues
North Korea test-fires multiple short-range ballistic missiles into sea
Iran parliament speaker signals final peace deal remains far off despite some negotiation movement
North Korea fires multiple short-range ballistic missiles into eastern waters
Strait of Hormuz remains closed as US-Iran ceasefire deadline approaches Wednesday
US intelligence assesses Iran retains 70% of pre-war missile stockpiles and 60% of launchers
